iterations.strategy: Root cause is two Category-A plan inefficiencies: (1) data_loading wastes ~12-15ms on per-string heap allocations while loading tag_numpre.dict (198,311 entries, 9.7MB) using fread+vector<string> — each of the ~198k entries with average length ~47 bytes (above SSO threshold) triggers a separate heap allocation; fix is to mmap the dict file and build a uint32_t offsets array + uint16_t lengths array (2 mallocs total), with string data accessed directly as char* pointers into the mmap buffer; (2) the dim_filter/merge phase wastes 12ms because building 2 thread-local hash maps (4MB each) and then merging them costs more than it saves — with only ~2 qualifying blocks and ~118k pure rows, single-threaded Phase 1 takes ~3ms and eliminates the 12ms merge entirely, also removing mmap(MAP_ANONYMOUS) page-fault overhead for the thread-local maps. Expected new total: ~30-35ms vs 58ms current.
